text.eyebrow: Investment case · Ad-hoc available | Scalable | High-performing
text.hero-title: Innovation macrophage therapies to transform the treatment paradigm of solid tumors
text.hero-subtitle: Off-the-shelf cell therapy with platform potential — translating scientific breakthrough into investable value.
text.short-title: A novel macrophage platform for solid tumors
text.short-text: We are developing a ready-to-use allogeneic macrophage cell therapy for cancer: first-in-class, broad tumor specificity as it is antigen-independent, unique resistance to exhaustion within the tumor, and industrially scalable manufacturing.
text.quote: A novel macrophage platform translates scientific breakthrough into investable value and eliminates key bottlenecks in today’s cell therapies for solid tumors.
text.problem-list:
• Cancer is the second leading cause of death worldwide.
  • Existing cell therapies are expensive and largely ineffective against solid tumors.
  • T-cells are antigen-dependent and rarely penetrate solid tumors.
  • Immune cells become exhausted within the tumor.
  • Macrophages are unable to proliferate.
text.solution-text: New xMACx macrophage cell therapy attacks solid tumors through a completely novel biological approach: metabolic enhancement, high proliferative capacity, resistance to exhaustion and persistent, stable anti-tumor effect at low cost.
text.market-list:
• Unmet medical need
  • Large addressable oncology markets
  • Multiple indications and partnering pathways
  • Early-stage licensing agreements
text.timeline-title: From strong IP basis to First-in-Human readiness
text.m2-text: Spin-off Eliacell, GMP MCB, scaling, regulatory and awareness marketing
text.m3-text: GMP validation, benchmarking and preparation of clinical trial
text.m4-text: Seed, Investigational medicinal product and First-in-Human readiness
text.focus-list:
• GMP Master cell bank
  • GMP validation
  • Preclinical de-risking
  • Process optimization
  • Scaling
  • Spin-off readiness
text.team-text:
Team of experts with practical experience from cell therapy companies in R&D/pipeline development, process/GMP development, in vivo testing and First-in-Human study design.
• scientific excellence in tumour biology / immunotherapy
• expertise in translational implementation
• clear focus on building a company
text.gallery-title: Scientific platform, team and stakeholder ecosystem
text.investor-text: EIC Transition acts as non-dilutive capital to reach spin-off readiness, seed funding, strategic partnerships and licensing. Next step: early discussions with investors and sparring.
